===
Dot-suffix unsigned integers
===
{
  u8:   123.U8,
  u16:  123.U16,
  u32:  123.U32,
  u64:  123.U64,
  u128: 123.U128,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint_dot)))))))

===
Dot-suffix signed integers
===
{
  i8:   123.I8,
  i16:  123.I16,
  i32:  123.I32,
  i64:  123.I64,
  i128: 123.I128,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint_dot)))))))

===
Dot-suffix decimal
===
{
  dec:  123.Dec,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (decimal_dot)))))))

===
Dot-suffix negative numbers
===
{
  u8Neg:   -123.U8,
  u16Neg:  -123.U16,
  u32Neg:  -123.U32,
  u64Neg:  -123.U64,
  u128Neg: -123.U128,
  i8Neg:   -123.I8,
  i16Neg:  -123.I16,
  i32Neg:  -123.I32,
  i64Neg:  -123.I64,
  i128Neg: -123.I128,
  decNeg:  -123.Dec,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (uint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (uint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (uint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (uint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (uint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (iint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (iint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (iint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (iint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (iint_dot)))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (prefixed_expression
            (const
              (decimal_dot))))))))

===
Dot-suffix binary numbers
===
{
  u8Bin:   0b101.U8,
  u16Bin:  0b101.U16,
  u32Bin:  0b101.U32,
  u64Bin:  0b101.U64,
  u128Bin: 0b101.U128,
  i8Bin:   0b101.I8,
  i16Bin:  0b101.I16,
  i32Bin:  0b101.I32,
  i64Bin:  0b101.I64,
  i128Bin: 0b101.I128,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot)))))))

===
Dot-suffix hex numbers
===
{
  u8Hex:   0xFF.U8,
  i32Hex:  0xDEADBEEF.I32,
  u64Hex:  0x123ABC.U64,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (xint_dot)))))))

===
Old immediate suffix format still works
===
{
  oldU8: 123u8,
  oldI32: 456i32,
  oldDec: 789dec,
}
---

(file
  (expr_body
    (record_expr
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (uint))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (iint))))
      (record_field_expr
        (field_name)
        (expr_body
          (const
            (decimal)))))))

===
nums_literals
===

number_literals : {
	usage_based: I64,
	explicit_u8: U8,
	explicit_i8: I8,
	explicit_u16: U16,
	explicit_i16: I16,
	explicit_u32: U32,
	explicit_i32: I32,
	explicit_u64: U64,
	explicit_i64: I64,
	explicit_u128: U128,
	explicit_i128: I128,
	# Note: F32, F64, and Dec literals use type inference which doesn't work with Str.inspect
	# So we use simple Dec literals here
	explicit_dec: Dec,
	hex: I64,
	octal: I64,
	binary: I64,
}
number_literals = {
	usage_based: 5,
	explicit_u8: 5,
	explicit_i8: 5,
	explicit_u16: 5,
	explicit_i16: 5,
	explicit_u32: 5,
	explicit_i32: 5,
	explicit_u64: 5,
	explicit_i64: 5,
	explicit_u128: 5,
	explicit_i128: 5,
	explicit_dec: 5.0,
	hex: 0x5,
	octal: 0o5,
	binary: 0b0101,
}
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (annotation_type_def
      (annotation_pre_colon
        (identifier))
      (record_type
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (line_comment)
        (line_comment)
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))
        (record_field_type
          (field_name)
          (apply_type
            (concrete_type)))))
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (record_expr
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (float))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (xint))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (xint))))
        (record_field_expr
          (field_name)
          (expr_body
            (const
              (xint))))))))
